landing.subtitle: Empowering farmers with AI-driven crop recommendations, real-time weather insights, government schemes, and live market prices — all in one platform.
landing.featuresDesc: Comprehensive tools and insights designed specifically for modern agriculture
landing.step1Desc: Tell us about your soil, location, and season preferences
landing.step2Desc: Our ML models analyze weather, soil, and market data
landing.step3Desc: Receive personalized crop, price, and scheme suggestions
landing.step4Desc: Follow the calendar, track prices, and maximize returns
landing.ctaDesc: Join thousands of farmers already using AgriSmart to grow better and earn more.
